title: American Express Turns Dining And Travel Perks Into A Lifestyle Platform
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) is expanding its premium dining and travel ecosystem with the upcoming launch of "The Summer Seat by Amex Gold & Resy." The company is building on its acquisitions of dining platforms, including Resy and Tock, to link reservations, exclusive events, and curated experiences with card benefits. title: Bernstein Hikes Delta Air Lines Price Target to $88 on Better Fuel Insulation
summary: Bernstein raised its price target on Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) to $88 from $81, reiterating an Outperform rating on the carrier. The firm’s thesis centers on Delta’s superior “fuel insulation,” a structural edge that matters more as oil prices remain elevated.
